tagline: See your Claude Code usage — and where you rank against other developers.
summary: Parses your local Claude Code transcripts (~/.claude/projects) into an interactive HTML dashboard: API-equivalent cost, tokens, sessions, model mix, tool distribution, cache efficiency, thinking and subagent rates, per-project and per-week breakdowns — plus a percentile placement against Anthropic's published per-developer figures. Cost reconciles to within ~1% of ccusage. No network, no account access.
capabilities: Deduplicates token/cost by message.id (counts each turn once, not once per content block)
Local cost estimate at Anthropic list prices, version-aware (Opus 4.5+ at the reduced tier)
Percentile placement via a lognormal fitted to Anthropic's published cost/active-day anchors
Per-project, per-model, per-tool, per-hour and per-week breakdowns from one transcript pass
